description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical orange body and two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircling its midsection. The cone is mounted on a large, square black base that provides stability and prevents tipping. The orange section is made of flexible plastic or rubber, designed to withstand impacts and return to shape. The white stripes are likely made of a reflective material to enhance visibility in low-light conditions. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, with no attachments or openings. The overall appearance is clean, undamaged, and typical of cones used for road safety and traffic control.
description: A bright orange traffic cone with two white reflective stripes and a sturdy black square base, appearing new and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the orange cone, both white stripes, and the wide black base.
description_view_1: Side view nearly identical to the front, displaying the same cone shape, stripes, and base.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with both stripes and the base clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the cone's symmetry, stripes, and base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal white reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the top and one at mid-height.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or openings.
attribute_base_design: The base is a large, thick, square platform made of black rubber or plastic, designed for stability and to prevent tipping.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
